code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (HealthTech_EMR_Sync), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (HealthTech_PatientRecords). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[HealthTech_PatientRecords] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (HealthTech_PatientRecords) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为医疗合规系统绘制一个流程图，核心是四个逐渐升级的惩罚机制，从轻微违规到严重违规。最底层是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，作为入口节点。
明白了，这是一个层级递进结构。HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault之后连接到哪个节点？我注意到您提到了四个级别。
第二层是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，通过imprecation边与第一层相连。这两个节点形成主链条的前两段。
好的，我已经添加了从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault到HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine的imprecation连接。继续第三层？
第三层是HealthTech_EMR_Sync，通过malediction边连接。注意这条边是从DiagnosticEngine指向EMR_Sync的。
确认一下：malediction连接的是DiagnosticEngine到EMR_Sync，不是从HIPAA_Vault直接连过去的，对吧？
对，完全正确。每一层都是顺序依赖的，必须完成前一层的惩罚才能进入下一层。第四层是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，通过scourge边从EMR_Sync延伸出去。
主链条已完成：HIPAA_Vault → DiagnosticEngine → EMR_Sync → LabAnalyzer，四条边分别是imprecation、malediction、scourge。还有一个特殊的分支节点吗？
是的，需要一个条件触发机制。创建一个叫Players Guide的子图，里面放HealthTech_PatientRecords节点，代表Conditional Curse。这个节点要从DiagnosticEngine有一条边连进来。
我注意到您说从DiagnosticEngine连到PatientRecords，但之前的主链条里DiagnosticEngine已经连到EMR_Sync了。这是分支结构，DiagnosticEngine有两个出边？
没错，DiagnosticEngine有两个出边：一条malediction继续主链条到EMR_Sync，另一条直接连到PatientRecords。这是并行路径的设计。
已添加Players Guide子图和内部的HealthTech_PatientRecords节点，以及从DiagnosticEngine到PatientRecords的连接。需要给这条边命名吗？
等等，我发现刚才的描述有问题。从DiagnosticEngine到PatientRecords的这条边不需要单独命名，保持无标签即可。但子图的名称应该是Players Guide，节点是conditional_curse显示为HealthTech_PatientRecords。
明白了，conditional_curse是节点的内部标识，显示文本是HealthTech_PatientRecords。子图标题为Players Guide。还有其他需要调整的吗？
每个节点都需要详细的回调信息。从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault开始，它的回调要包含Tiny Damnation的完整规则：5 motes消耗、一天持续期、四种诅咒选项，特别注意最后一点关于Ability checks的说明。
已添加HIPAA_Vault的回调，包含Cost、Duration、Type等字段，以及四种诅咒选项的详细描述。继续配置DiagnosticEngine？
DiagnosticEngine对应Imprecation，10 motes、一周持续期。关键是它有六个诅咒选项，比第一层多两个：Attribute dot损失和可见标记。回调里要强调这些差异。
我注意到Imprecation的前提条件是Tiny Damnation，这在回调里需要提及。另外，Bad luck的描述里提到了HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine自身，这是递归引用吗？
对，回调文本里确实会引用节点自身的名称，这是设计上的自我指涉，不是错误。继续配置EMR_Sync，它对应Malediction，15 motes加1 Willpower，可以扭曲其他Charm的效果。
EMR_Sync的回调已添加，包含扭曲Charm效果的特殊规则，以及提及HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine可以被扭曲。接下来是LabAnalyzer？
LabAnalyzer是Scourge，最严重的惩罚，20 motes加1 permanent Willpower。回调里要包含永久损失：Attribute、Ability、Willpower、Essence都可能永久降低。还有多条边引用其他节点：HIPAA_Vault、PatientRecords、EMR_Sync。
Scourge的回调文本很长，我注意到里面多次穿插其他节点名称，比如HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault出现在诅咒描述中，HealthTech_PatientRecords和HealthTech_EMR_Sync也有提及。这些引用需要精确对应吗？
是的，这些引用是规则文本的一部分，必须保持原样。比如HealthTech_EMR_Sync出现在关于永久Attribute损失和物理特征改变的描述中。最后配置PatientRecords的回调。
PatientRecords的回调已添加，包含Conditional Curse的完整规则：3 motes加1 Willpower、直到Calibration的持续期、延迟触发机制。文本中提到了Benefaction/Imprecation作为前提，以及Malfeas的引用。
检查一下整体结构：主链条四个节点顺序连接，DiagnosticEngine额外分出一条边到子图内的PatientRecords。所有节点都有click回调。主题设置为dark。
确认结构：四个主节点形成TD流向的链条，边分别为imprecation、malediction、scourge；DiagnosticEngine到PatientRecords的无标签边；PatientRecords置于Players Guide子图内；config theme为dark。完整吗？
还有一点，所有回调文本中的换行要用<br标签，特别是多段描述的地方。比如Tiny Damnation的诅咒列表、Imprecation的六个项目、Scourge的复杂规则都需要正确格式化。
所有回调的<br标签已检查和修正。流程图完成：dark主题，四个层级的主链条，一个条件分支子图，全部节点带详细回调。可以最终确认了。
